summary: Successfully tested roofing demo page functionality - all features working correctly including Before/After toggle, navigation, and homepage integration
passed_tests: Homepage roofing card shows 'View Demo' link and navigates correctly
Before/After toggle switch functionality works perfectly
Before state displays old-style design with dark blue background and Bangers font
After state displays modern design with light background and Libre Baskerville serif font
Toggle bar 'Liminal Group' link navigates back to homepage
Toggle bar 'Get Your Free Audit' CTA navigates to /#audit
Restaurant demo page still works at /demos/restaurant
Homepage pricing section with all three cards intact
Homepage audit section and form working correctly
